findings.title: Test file contains hardcoded credential
findings.description: A hardcoded credential found in a test file (upst...cret). This is unlikely to be a production secret, but test values should still use env vars for consistency.
findings.recommendation: Consider using environment variables or test helpers to generate test credentials.

findings.title: Example file contains potential secret
findings.description: This file appears to be an example/template, but it contains a real-looking secret (eyJh...s...). Example files should use placeholder values like "your-api-key-here" — never real credentials.
findings.recommendation: Replace the secret value with a placeholder like "your-api-key-here".
